trending_companies.name: Adani Green Energy Limited
trending_companies.reason: Adani Green is one of the prominent players in India's renewable energy space. It has seen significant institutional accumulation as evident from unusual options activity, including a high call/put volume ratio and a notable increase in open interest over recent weeks. The company benefitted from new wind farm project approvals recently and exhibits strong relative momentum compared to the NIFTY 50 index.

trending_companies.name: Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Limited
trending_companies.reason: IREDA, a mid-cap player in green energy infrastructure financing and development, has seen an uptick in social media discussions on platforms like Reddit and StockTwits. Positive sentiment is driving its momentum as the company reports robust progress in solar projects amidst regulatory changes supporting renewable sources of power.

trending_companies.name: Solar Bank Limited
trending_companies.reason: Small-cap player Solar Bank has seen a breakout above a multi-month consolidation pattern, supported by high relative volume over the past month. This coincides with supply chain improvements for solar panel components which are boosting its growth trajectory.
